flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Heidelberg University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 45.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Heidelberg University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 915).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Heidelberg University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (49.8% vs 58.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Heidelberg University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
